Package io.forja.components.inputs.fxTagInput

Class FxTagInput

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.inputs.fxTagInput.FxTagInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxTagInput extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A tag entry field — a wrapping row of FxChip tags plus an inline TextField for adding new ones.

Type text, press ENTER to commit as a tag. Press BACKSPACE on an empty field to remove the last tag. Click the × on any chip to remove it.

Builder usage:

     
      FxTagInput tags = FxTagInput.builder()
          .tags("java", "javafx")
          .promptText("Add tag…")
          .onChange(list -> viewModel.setTags(list))
          .build();
See Also:
